name: iA Writer
description: Distraction-free writing app with syntax highlighting

extraction.pattern: SUFeedURL from Info.plist provides the appcast URL

download.url: Sparkle enclosure URL from appcast XML

release_date.field: pubDate in Sparkle XML, or iTunes API results[0].currentVersionReleaseDate

notes: Available on Mac App Store (id 775737590) and as direct download. Direct download uses Sparkle (SUFeedURL in Info.plist). Appcast URL contains major version number. Paid-once pricing model.
